main_prompt: A brilliant fictional engineer in a high-tech laboratory, designing the next generation of intelligent exoskeleton technology. The engineer is focused on a holographic interface displaying biomechanical schematics. The exoskeleton design is sleek, non-militarized, with glowing energy nodes and adaptive joints. Laboratory environment features clean lines, transparent displays, floating data projections, and advanced fabrication tools. Cinematic lighting, cyberpunk aesthetic with utopian elements, highly detailed.
negative_prompt: weapons, combat gear, militarized armor, violence, gore, blood, explicit content, disturbing imagery, unsafe technology, copyrighted characters, famous IP, low quality, blurry, deformed, ugly.
style: cinematic, cyberpunk utopian, sci-fi concept art, highly detailed, photorealistic
chinese_summary: 一位虚构的天才工程师在充满未来感的高科技实验室中，专注于研发下一代智能外骨骼技术。场景呈现赛博朋克乌托邦风格，注重细节与光影效果。
